All references to “Razorpay PA”, “us,” or “we," or "our " under these Terms will automatically and exclusively mean and refer to the Transferor Entity till the Transfer Date and to the Transferee Entity from the Transfer Date. Your continued access to or use of the Services on or after the Transfer Date constitutes Your express and irrevocable consent to the novation of this Agreement to the Transferee Entity, which shall be Your sole contracting party from the Transfer Date. The Terms, constituted of Part A: General Terms and Conditions and Part B: Specific Terms and Conditions, govern Your access to and use of Razorpay PA’s payment services, including payment aggregation, point of sale devices and soundboxes (“Devices”), technology, software, analytics or any other services, tools or products offered or made available by Razorpay PA and/or its Facility Providers (“Services”). The Services may be offered or made available to You via the Website, mobile applications, software, APIs, social media, or other access channels (“Platform”). Your use of the Platform and Services is also subject to the Website Terms of Use, which are incorporated herein by reference. “You”, “Your(s)”, “Yourself” or “Merchant” refers to a merchant, (whether a non-registered individual/sole proprietor or corporate body), who registers for use, or accesses the Platform or Services. The Services provided by Razorpay PA through the Platform are available and are appropriate only for use in India. If You are a Merchant based outside of India collecting monies from Indian buyers, the provision of these Services is governed by Part A (General Terms and Conditions) and the combined provisions of Part B, Part I (Payment Aggregation Services), and Part B, Part IB (Specific Terms for Cross-Border Outward Transactions), with Part IB superseding any conflicting general provisions.
